name: generate_attack_tree
description: Create a prioritized attack tree for a target architecture, mapping techniques to mitigations and controls.

parameters.name: provision_isolated_lab
parameters.description: Provision an ephemeral, fully isolated lab environment (VMs, networks) for adversary emulation. Authorization required.

parameters.name: generate_data_retention_policy
parameters.description: Produce a data retention policy document tailored to the inputs (region, data-class, retention_days).
